home.aboutP1: The <1>Iámbica</1> Festival (FI) is an annual event dedicated to the exploration, production, and exhibition of contemporary artistic practices that integrate advanced technology, digital innovation, and multimedia experimentation.
home.aboutP2: This festival aspires to make Puerto Rico a Caribbean hub of avant-garde for artists, technologists, researchers, and communities interested in the art of the future.
home.missionText: To create an accessible, inclusive, and dynamic space where artists and communities can explore the possibilities of technological art, promoting innovation, education, and global collaboration from Puerto Rico.
home.objective1: Promote the creation and exhibition of contemporary technological art.
home.objective2: Expose the general public to emerging and accessible practices.
home.objective3: Strengthen the cultural, academic, and technological networks of the local ecosystem.
home.historyDesc: Explore the archive of Festival Iámbica — experimental art, electronic music, and digital media from Puerto Rico.

history.archiveDesc: A living record of Festival Iámbica — documenting the origins of Puerto Rico's experimental art, electronic music, and digital media movement.
